findings.evidence: `HomeomorphAction.lean:36-40` defines the instance and line 39 is `change Continuous fun x => (g : G) • x`; Mathlib exposes the relevant lemma at `Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Actions.lean:32`, `lemma smul_def (g : S) (m : α) : g • m = (g : G) • m := rfl`.
findings.fix: Replace the `change` with an explicit rewrite such as `simpa only [Subgroup.smul_def] using continuous_const_smul (g : G)`, or add a short comment explaining why this coercion/defeq step is unavoidable.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.Subgroup.continuousConstSMul` uses `change Continuous fun x => (g : G) • x` without a comment, relying on the definitional shape of Mathlib's subgroup action transfer.

summary: One new proof uses an undocumented `change` to cross from subgroup action notation to the ambient action, which is exactly the kind of definitional-equality dependency this rubric asks to avoid or justify.
